programmes.show_name: Mary Millington: Come Play With Me
programmes.show_description: Two hapless forgers hide out in a Scottish manor house. When a troupe of dancing girls join them musical numbers, comedy and sauce ensues. Contains sexual scenes.
4/8. Under the hammer this time: a slice of royal wedding cake, a skeleton straight out of the wardrobe, a rare London tube map, and some vintage Soho sex-shop neon.
4/5. The team mark the centenary of the 5th Earl of Carnarvon's discovery of Tutankhamen's tomb, and prepare for the biggest event of the summer - the Battle Proms
Our intrepid presenters lift the lid on the secrets of our festive food - sprouts, turkeys and why we fall asleep after our massive Christmas Day meals

5/8. Superfans bid for Nike trainers and Oasis lyrics hand-written by Noel. A prized work by sculptor Anish Kapoor and vintage luggage with a history also go under the hammer.

2/8. Stefan examines the differing conditions under which hens lay eggs. Sian asks how effective at probiotic drinks really are. Own-brand cereals vs. the best-known brands.
5/5. The castle transforms into a magical winter wonderland, as the team wrestle their biggest-ever tree and butler Louis gets very merry hosting a cocktail making master class. Last in series.

Raucous period romp following a poor country girl who goes to London in pursuit of wealth, happiness and a bit of the other. Stars Ollie Reed and Lisa Forster. Contains sex scenes.
Spy thriller. Promising Oxford University students are disappearing. An M15 investigation uncovers a pattern of accidents and arrests. Is the KGB involved? Terence Stamp stars.

7/35. Charlie Dimmock and Chris Hull are in Burton-on-Trent to design a Moroccan-inspired space for Tariq, Kim and their children as a nod to Tariq's north African heritage
Jazzy Whipps is the UK's biggest deaf influencer - but success brings trolling. It takes courage and resilience to be Jazzy. Funded and supported by Together TV and BSLBT.

6/12. Carianne takes a bull to the Oban Highland Show. The Barclays are up all hours as they start lambing. Rachel and Camy gather in their ewes for an important pregnancy scan.
7/12. Rachel and Camy prepare to welcome the Park Cheviot lambs. Nikki and Ollie's rabbit-breeding programme bears fruit. Robert heads to market to sell previous year's calves.
8/12. Jenni moves her alpacas to their new arena. The MacDonalds organise a massive breakfast run for their pregnant cows. Nikki and Ollie invest in a new honesty shack.
9/12. Carianne searches for the missing mother of a newborn calf. Rachel and Camy are on the hills tending to their Cheviots. John and Heather help to deliver their Beltex lambs.
Action. World War II. Allied commandos are parachuted into North Africa on a mission to infiltrate and hold an Axis-held fort until reinforcements arrive. Lee Van Cleef stars.
Comedy. The story of Great Train Robber Buster Edwards, a small-timer who fell in with more ambitious thieves. Phil Collins and Julie Walters star.
It's Christmas Eve and six lonely people are looking to grab an elusive slice of enjoyment. Who better to contact than an escort agency. Contains sex scenes and distressing scenes.
